title: Duo Poop: It's not Jacky Chen...
description:
After such a long time school work and testing I was finally able to pull out yet another video, hope you all enjoy this one because it's a double feature poop with Guysafari...

http://www.youtube.com/user/guysafari

The idea came into our heads as soon as we watched an episode of "Jacky Chen Misadventures" where Chen gets divided into two different people Light and Dark, I told Guysafari to help me out and to try and focus his poop on one Chen so he picked Light Chen, I picked Dark.

It was a long project for a while and I hope you enjoy it, this will be the last poop with an actual intro excluding the Tennis rounds (unless otherwise noted)

See ya'll later!
